title: JP's Clearer AppleSkin
description: Changes the color of saturation whilst using AppleSkin.
body:
## 🌊 JP's Clearer AppleSkin
Changes the color of saturation whilst using AppleSkin.
> Supports versions 1.16 -> Latest

![AppleSkin Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e283306d734fc64ad7e2d2832007beabd20d4a39.gif)

_Comparison of Clearer AppleSkin vs Vanilla AppleSkin (No resource pack)._

## 🥽 See the small details!
Not many people may know this, but AppleSkin has a second _subtle_ bar, that indicates when your next food point will get depleted. This resource pack also adds extra visibility for this bar, making it red (see image)!
